runtimeProofs.name: shared_layer_retouch_runtime_stale_regeneration
proves: heal preview and apply output deltas are identical on the shared layer runtime
remove output changes image pixels through local_patch_fill_v1 source resolution
editing remove parameters clears the persisted resolved source and records needs_regeneration
a stale remove layer regenerates a distinct ready output and persists the new resolved source through the layer stack bridge

runtimeProofs.name: private_raw_native_clone_heal_remove_retouch_preview_export_proof
proves: native RAW decode can render clone, heal, and resolved-source remove retouch layers
private RAW preview and export use the same clone/heal/remove retouch output
remove and heal retouch layers change runtime image output
remove source edits are tracked as stale by clearing the resolved source and setting needs_regeneration
stale remove layers regenerate a new ready source through the same layer runtime path used for preview/export proofing
the existing native private RAW proof path validates heal/remove output on the Alaska RAW corpus with private artifacts kept out of the public repo
doesNotProve: native Rust unresolved remove-source selection; native remove rendering consumes the resolved source produced by the shared layer runtime
multi-stroke heal/remove quality or edge-aware texture synthesis

limitations: The committed focused stale-regeneration proof uses a synthetic pixel fixture because the shared layer runtime owns unresolved remove-source selection.
The native private RAW proof validates real RAW clone/heal/remove rendering with resolved remove sources and writes private artifacts outside the repo.
